message:
test(e2e): add Ratings & Reviews E2E test coverage

Add comprehensive E2E tests for the ratings system on Swap Meet pages:
- ratings-helpers.ts: Shared selectors and helper functions
- rate.spec.ts: Thumbs up/down rating, toggle, accessibility
- display.spec.ts: Rating display on cards, detail pages, stats bar
- reviews.spec.ts: Review CRUD operations (skipped until feature implemented)

42 tests pass, 26 skipped (reviews feature pending).

Resolves: 8ado

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
